creator: alexander@polyvizor.com
text:
This port puts its config file 'cluebringer.conf' and its sample '  cluebringer.conf.sample' in /usr/local/etc/ during installation. Most other mail filter ports put there configs in /usr/local/etc/mail or at least in a separate subdir in /usr/local/etc.
For unification and user convinience it's better to change policyd2 config files installation path to /usr/local/etc/mail like in other mail filter ports.
